title: Post-093 Trigger Framework Dormancy Readiness Verdict
objective: Consume the published Packet 092 trigger-framework authority and Packet 093 clean host parity to record the final dormancy/readiness verdict for the simultaneous-worker lane without reopening execution.
verdict_summary: Packet 094 records that the simultaneous-worker lane is dormant until a later packet cites new evidence satisfying the Packet 092 trigger framework. The lane remains authorable only with new evidence; no paired-objective selection, source/test execution, or simultaneous-worker execution is open.
reopen_criteria: A later packet must cite new post-Packet-090 evidence.
The future evidence must name one real apparatus objective and one real relay objective.
Both objectives must fit inside Packet 082 worker-owned surfaces.
The future packet must prove no coordinator-owned, shared, package, lockfile, install, runtime, service, remote, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation is required.
The future packet must restate Packet 082 ownership and Packet 084 abort rules before any execution-opening decision.
insufficient_reopen_evidence: Re-running Packet 090 discovery with no new evidence.
Work chosen only to exercise simultaneous-worker machinery.
Cosmetic churn, naming churn, or assertion rearrangement without a defect or bounded requirement.

Any objective requiring shared `browser-env`, static-surfaces validation, layout/style/config, package files, lockfiles, installs, runtime, services, remotes, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
Any objective requiring ownership-rule changes without a separate planning packet.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 095 - Packet 093 And Packet 094 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This verdict packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, paired-objective selection, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
